description_long: This is a wooden desk ensemble featuring a central rectangular table with a plank-style surface, flanked by two hexagonal side tables. The main desk is accompanied by a tall bookshelf at the back, filled with books and a few scattered papers. On the desk and side tables are various small objects, including an open book, a cup, a spherical object, and some bottles, suggesting an environment of study or research. The wood has a medium brown finish with visible grain, and the furniture legs are simple and sturdy. The overall setup gives a sense of a workspace designed for reading, writing, or scholarly activities.
description: A wooden desk set with a central table, bookshelf, and two side tables, adorned with books and study items. The ensemble has a warm brown finish and evokes a scholarly workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main desk, bookshelf with books and papers, and both side tables with an open book and a spherical object.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bookshelf, the tabletop with scattered items, and the spherical object on the right side table.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the bookshelf and the tops of the side tables, with less detail visible on the main desk.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the side of the bookshelf, the open book on the left side table, and the arrangement of objects on the main desk.
attribute_location: library reading room or academic study
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge of the main desk, with the bookshelf positioned at the back and side tables to the left and right, indicating the front is where the user would sit to access the desk and bookshelf.
attribute_usage_context: reading and writing workspace for study or research
